testcase.name: test_checkout_sections_in_website_settings

failure.message: AssertionError: No checkout sections or legacy checkout config found in settings assert (False or False or False)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter84_p0_bugs.py:102: in test_checkout_sections_in_website_settings assert has_new_sections or has_legacy_zoho or has_legacy_partner, \ E AssertionError: No checkout sections or legacy checkout config found in settings E assert (False or False or False)

testcase.name: test_website_context_has_checkout_data

failure.message: AssertionError: No checkout-related settings found assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter84_p0_bugs.py:114: in test_website_context_has_checkout_data assert len(checkout_keys) > 0, "No checkout-related settings found" E AssertionError: No checkout-related settings found E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_checkout_sections_parse_correctly

failure.message: AssertionError: Neither new checkout_sections nor legacy checkout config found assert ('checkout_zoho_enabled' in {'accent_color': '#ee4037', 'contact_email': '', 'logo_url': '', 'primary_color': '#0f172a', ...} or 'checkout_partner_enabled' in {'accent_color': '#ee4037', 'contact_email': '', 'logo_url': '', 'primary_color': '#0f172a', ...})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter84_p0_bugs.py:137: in test_checkout_sections_parse_correctly assert "checkout_zoho_enabled" in settings or "checkout_partner_enabled" in settings, \ E AssertionError: Neither new checkout_sections nor legacy checkout config found E assert ('checkout_zoho_enabled' in {'accent_color': '#ee4037', 'contact_email': '', 'logo_url': '', 'primary_color': '#0f172a', ...} or 'checkout_partner_enabled' in {'accent_color': '#ee4037', 'contact_email': '', 'logo_url': '', 'primary_color': '#0f172a', ...})

testcase.name: test_store_products_available_for_cart

failure.message: AssertionError: Store products failed: 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter84_p0_bugs.py:143: in test_store_products_available_for_cart assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Store products failed: {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Store products failed: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_manual_order_creation_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: POST /admin/orders/manual endpoint not found (404) assert 404 != 404 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter84_p0_bugs.py:204: in test_admin_manual_order_creation_endpoint_exists assert resp.status_code != 404, "POST /admin/orders/manual endpoint not found (404)" E AssertionError: POST /admin/orders/manual endpoint not found (404) E assert 404 != 404 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_can_get_website_settings

failure.message: AssertionError: Admin website settings failed: 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter84_p0_bugs.py:358: in test_admin_can_get_website_settings assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Admin website settings failed: {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Admin website settings failed: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_website_settings_has_checkout_config
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter84_p0_bugs.py:364: in test_admin_website_settings_has_checkout_config s = admin_session() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iter84_p0_bugs.py:57: in admin_session assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {resp.status_code} {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: 429 {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down and try again."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
